commands.review_summary:
The PR expands `skills/github/SKILL.md` Auth guidance with an explicit Gateway restart command after installing `gh` or changing `PATH`, plus clearer `GH_CONFIG_DIR`/HOME wording.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main lacks the explicit post-install/PATH restart block, while the GitHub skill is gated on `gh` and binary lookup is process/PATH dependent; I did not run a live install/restart repro for this review.
commands.review_followup: The only blocker is contributor-owned real behavior proof; there is no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to queue.

target.title: docs(github): make post-install restart explicit
target.body:
## Summary
- Problem: GitHub skill restart requirement after installing `gh` is easy to miss.
- Solution: Make the restart guidance explicit and add the canonical restart command.
- What changed: Expanded `skills/github/SKILL.md` Auth section with restart + HOME notes.
- What did NOT change (scope boundary): No runtime logic, binaries, tooling, or behavior.

## Motivation
Users can successfully install/auth `gh`, then assume the GitHub skill is broken until the Gateway restarts. This makes the required restart and the exact command obvious.

## Change Type (select all)
- [x] Docs

## Scope (select all touched areas)
- [x] Skills / tool execution

## Linked Issue/PR
- Closes #65958

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)
Documentation-only change. I verified `openclaw gateway restart` is the documented Gateway restart command (see `docs/cli/gateway.md`).
target.author: nielskaspers
